text: <par>This is M. V. Sofronov's reconstruction (1968), cited in Kepping 1975:228. Nishida 1966:349 reconstructs <latinform>ɬa</latinform>.</par>
<par>M1 = 227 (or 228?); or all = 227 w/ epenthetic vowels? (but looks like 2 morphemes)</par>
<par>This compound looks exactly parallel to Dumi <latinform>roː rɨ</latinform>.</par>
